title: Software Engineer - JavaScript
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading technology company renowned for its innovative approach to AI and software development. As one of the fastest\\-growing AI organizations globally, Turing specializes in accelerating the deployment of advanced AI systems and fostering cutting\\-edge research. The company is committed to transforming the landscape of artificial intelligence by integrating it seamlessly into practical applications, particularly in the realm of software engineering. With a focus on quality, innovation, and collaboration, Turing empowers talented professionals to work on impactful projects that shape the future of technology.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced software engineers at the tech lead level to join our dynamic team. This role is pivotal in contributing to our groundbreaking project focused on building large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets tailored for realistic software engineering problems. The ideal candidate will have a deep understanding of high\\-quality public GitHub repositories and possess the skills necessary to contribute to the development, automation, and evaluation of software engineering tasks. Responsibilities include automating development environments, triaging issues, and assessing test coverage and quality across various codebases. This position offers an excellent opportunity to work at the intersection of software engineering and AI research, impacting how AI models understand and interact with complex code.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should have a minimum of three years of professional experience in software engineering, with demonstrated expertise in JavaScript and TypeScript. Proficiency with version control systems like Git, containerization tools such as Docker, and experience setting up and managing software pipelines are essential. Candidates must be comfortable navigating and understanding complex codebases, running and modifying projects locally, and evaluating code quality. Experience contributing to open\\-source projects or working with large\\-scale repositories is a plus. Strong problem\\-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work collaboratively in a fast\\-paced environment are also required.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Analyze and triage issues reported on GitHub across trending open\\-source libraries to identify challenges and opportunities for improvement.
* Set up and configure development environments, including Dockerization and other automation tools, to streamline project workflows.
* Evaluate unit test coverage, quality, and effectiveness to ensure robustness of codebases.
* Modify and run codebases locally to assess the performance of LLMs in bug\\-fixing and code comprehension scenarios.
* Collaborate closely with research teams to design and select repositories and issues that present challenges for LLMs, contributing to dataset expansion and quality.
* Lead and mentor junior engineers, fostering a collaborative environment and ensuring the successful execution of project tasks.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing provides the opportunity to work remotely in a flexible environment, enabling a healthy work\\-life balance. You will be part of a forward\\-thinking organization that values innovation and professional growth. The role offers exposure to cutting\\-edge AI projects, allowing you to expand your expertise in both software engineering and artificial intelligence. Additionally, you will have access to a global network of talented professionals, participate in impactful projects, and enjoy the flexibility to choose your preferred working hours within the defined commitments. Turing also provides opportunities for career advancement and continuous learning through collaboration with leading AI researchers and industry experts.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is an equal\\-opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, gender, ethnicity, religion, age, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse workforce enhances innovation and drives better outcomes, and we are dedicated to fostering a workplace where everyone can thrive and contribute to our mission of advancing AI technology.

title: IT Engineer
description:
**Company Description** 
 Jhunjhunwala Institute of Medical Sciences is a higher education institution focused on providing quality medical and paramedical programs. The institute is committed to academic excellence, evidence\\-based learning, and professional training for future healthcare practitioners. It emphasizes a supportive learning environment, modern infrastructure, and adherence to high educational standards. The institute also encourages the integration of technology into education and operations to improve outcomes for learners and staff.
   

**Role Description** 
 This is a full\\-time, on\\-site IT Engineer role based in Ayodhya. The IT Engineer will manage and maintain the institute’s IT infrastructure, including servers, workstations, and peripheral devices used in academic, clinical, and administrative departments. Responsibilities include providing technical support to faculty, staff, and students; diagnosing and resolving hardware, software, and network issues; and ensuring reliable connectivity across the campus. The role involves monitoring network performance, implementing security measures, maintaining backups, and coordinating with vendors for hardware and software procurement or maintenance. The IT Engineer will also assist in deploying new systems, updating existing applications, documenting configurations, and supporting technology\\-enabled teaching, learning, and hospital information systems.
   

**Qualifications**
  

* Strong foundation in Information Technology, including operating systems, hardware, and common enterprise software.
* Proficiency in Troubleshooting and Technical Support to diagnose and resolve user and system issues efficiently.
* Hands\\-on experience with Networking, including configuration of switches, routers, Wi\\-Fi, and basic cabling.
* Working knowledge of Network Security principles, such as firewalls, antivirus, access control, and data protection best practices.
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field; relevant certifications (e.g., CCNA, CompTIA Network\\+, CompTIA A\\+) are an advantage.
* Ability to document procedures, maintain asset inventories, and follow change management practices.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to support users with varying technical proficiency in a healthcare and academic environment.
* Experience in hospital or education\\-sector IT systems (e.g., HIS, LMS, EHR) is beneficial.

title: AI Product Engineer
description:
**AI Product Engineer — FuturePath AI** 




  





 FuturePath is an Enterprise AI Apps Platform that turns complex human work into software. Our customers are Fortune 500 companies in pharma, banking, aviation, telecom, and healthcare. Our AI Applications take on recurring high\\-judgment work that today is done by large teams of people.
 



 We're looking for an AI Product Engineer to help build and ship our next generation of AI Applications. You'll work on the core product surface our enterprise customers use every day. The work spans LLM orchestration, agentic workflows, retrieval, evals, and the application UI on top.
 



  





**What You'll Achieve** 



* Prototype and ship new AI Applications and capabilities into production
* Build and scale agentic workflows that run reliably in enterprise environments
* Improve the accuracy, reliability, and cost profile of our LLM\\-powered systems through evals, prompting, fine\\-tuning, and routing
* Work directly with Forward Deployed Engineers to turn real workflows into shipped product
* Collaborate across AI, Platform, and Product to deliver experiences that hold up at Fortune 500 scale
* Stay current on frontier model capabilities and bring useful ideas back into the product



  





**Skills You'll Need** 



* *Expertise building AI products.* 
 You've shipped real LLM\\-powered features in production. You're comfortable across the stack from UI to data model, know how to choose between prompting, RAG, fine\\-tuning, and tool use, and have worked with relational databases like Postgres. You can build from a blank file to a customer\\-ready product.
* *Problem\\-solving.* 
 You start from a clear understanding of the context before you write code. You break ambiguous problems into clean solutions and weigh business impact against engineering cost. You think about what happens when the model is wrong, not just when it's right.
* *Empathetic communication and collaboration.* 
 You explain technical decisions clearly in writing and in real time. You disagree well, change your mind when the argument is better, and enjoy working with engineers, designers, and FDEs.
* *Impact orientation.* 
 You prioritize by business impact. You understand the trade between craft, speed, and shipping. You care about what happens to the people whose work our software changes.



  





**Nice to Haves** 



* 3\\+ years shipping production software, with a track record of owning features end to end
* Familiarity with our stack: Python, TypeScript, React, Postgres
* Experience with agent frameworks, eval harnesses, and observability for LLM systems
* Experience working in enterprise or regulated industries
* You've shipped against ambiguous, high\\-stakes deadlines at a startup before
* You read broadly outside of software, in history, design, science, or the arts



  





**About FuturePath** 




 We're a Series A stage company building the platform that turns complex human roles into AI Applications. We work with the largest service integrators in the world to deliver this software at scale. If you want to ship AI that does real work for real businesses, and you want to do it in a small team where what you build matters, talk to us.
 



 We hire builders from a range of backgrounds. If you don't match every bullet but you ship great software and you're excited about the problem, apply anyway.

title: Senior Embedded Engineer
description:
**Summary:** 




 We are looking for a Senior Embedded Engineer with 3–5 years of experience to design and develop embedded software/firmware for IOT \\& Robotic solutions. You will work on real\\-world hardware, solve complex problems, and ensure high\\-quality, timely delivery of projects — while also contributing to integrating AI/ML capabilities into embedded systems for intelligent, data\\-driven functionality at the edge.
 



  





**Position Overview:** 




 We are looking for an engineer to develop and optimize firmware for embedded platforms, working closely with hardware and cross\\-functional teams. The role involves end\\-to\\-end development, performance tuning, and enabling intelligent features on edge devices with a focus on efficiency and reliability. You will also contribute to solving complex system\\-level challenges and building scalable, high\\-quality solutions.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Design and develop embedded firmware using Embedded C/C\\+\\+.
* Design and develop embedded software using Embedded C/C\\+\\+/Python.
* Design, Develop, Test Peripheral drivers for Linux/RTOS at Kernel \\& User Level
* Work on microcontrollers, peripherals, and hardware interfaces.
* Develop and integrate communication interfaces like UART, SPI, I2C, USB, PCIe, Ethernet.
* Debug and troubleshoot embedded systems using tools like debuggers, oscilloscopes, and logic analyzers.
* Develop Functional, unit tests and validate firmware functionality and automate the same.
* Analyze system performance and optimize code.
* Participate in full development lifecycle: design, coding, testing, and debugging.
* Collaborate with hardware and other software teams to solve system\\-level issues.
* Create prototypes to validate design concepts.
* Collaborate on integrating AI/ML models into embedded development lifecycle or edge devices.



  





**Qualification:** 



* Strong programming skills in Embedded C/C\\+\\+/Python.
* Working Experience with Linux/RTOS
* Minimum 3–5 years of experience in embedded Software/firmware development.
* Good understanding of embedded systems architecture.
* Experience with hardware interfaces like UART, SPI, I2C,USB, PCIe, Ethernet.
* Strong debugging and problem\\-solving skills.
* Strong understanding of memory management and real\\-time constraints.
* Familiarity with development tools like compilers, debuggers, and version control (Git).



  





**Good to have:** 



* Working experience or understanding of Micro\\-Controllers and Processors like ARM, PIC, x86, DSP.
* Working experience or understanding of specific RTOS variation like Zephyr, VxWorks, Free RTOS.
* Working experience or understanding with BSP development.
* Working experience or understanding with Linux distributions \\& build environments.



  





**Benefits:** 



* We want every Soliton member to grow to their highest potential. Our work environment helps individuals explore their interests and potential and reach out to the resources and people available at Soliton to realize them. Read more about what it’s like to work at Soliton. Soliton Employee Value Proposition.
* Solitons choose their work hours as long as they take into account the requirements of the job. We take special care to support mothers to excel at work while they handle their responsibilities at home.
* At Soliton, we believe that every team member contributes to our success and revenue, directly or indirectly. To recognize this, we share a portion of our profits with all Solitons. Starting from your second year with us, you’ll be eligible to receive a share of the company’s profits.
* Health insurance for employees and families, gym and cycle allowance – your health is a priority!



  





**About Soliton:** 




 Soliton Technologies Pvt. Ltd., a high\\-technology software company headquartered in Bangalore, India.
 



  





 Soliton works with global companies, from start\\-ups to Fortune 500, across industries including Semiconductors, Medical Devices, Automotive, Industry 4\\.0, and Robotics to help them increase their competitiveness and release great products through Software Engineering Services. Since 1997, we have been growing over 25% annually because we especially focus on raising our standards constantly, to deliver excellent experience to both our customers and our employees.
 



 Soliton Technologies is a certified Great Place to Work® in the Mid\\-Sized Organizations Category, recognized and issued by the Great Place to Work® Institute. This certification is a testament to our focus on our values of Respect, Integrity, Excellence and Innovation.
 



 With a team of over 400 employees across the world, we forge ahead as engineers working to our heart’s content, moving humanity forward.
 



  





**Additional Details:** 



* Work Location (Bangalore/Chennai/Coimbatore): This role will require working from the office (WFO) for the first 12 months. Based on individual performance and business requirements, a remote or hybrid work option may be considered after one year.
* For more information, visit https://www.solitontech.com/and read the Impact Report to get a glimpse of the first 25 years of our truly meaningful journey.

title: Data Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises deploying advanced AI systems. Turing supports customers in two ways: first, by accelerating frontier research with high\\-quality data, advanced training pipelines, plus top AI researchers who specialize in coding, reasoning, STEM, multilinguality, multimodality, and agents; and second, by applying that expertise to help enterprises transform AI from proof of concept into proprietary intelligence with systems that perform reliably, deliver measurable impact, and drive lasting results on the P\\&L.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced Software Engineers (SWE Bench – Data Engineer / Data Science) to join our team and contribute to benchmark\\-driven evaluation projects centered on real\\-world data engineering and data science workflows. This role requires hands\\-on involvement with production\\-like datasets, data pipelines, and data science tasks to evaluate and enhance the performance of cutting\\-edge AI systems. The ideal candidate will possess a strong foundation in data engineering and data science, with the ability to work seamlessly across data preparation, analysis, and model\\-related workflows within complex codebases.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The successful candidate will have at least 3\\+ years of experience as a Data Engineer, Data Scientist, or Software Engineer with a focus on data. Proficiency in Python is essential for executing data engineering and data science workflows. Demonstrable experience with data processing, analysis, and model\\-related workflows is required, along with a solid understanding of machine learning and data science fundamentals. Experience working with both structured and unstructured data is necessary, along with the ability to understand, navigate, and modify complex, real\\-world codebases. Candidates must also demonstrate the ability to write readable, reusable, maintainable, and well\\-documented code. Strong problem\\-solving skills, including experience with algorithmic or data\\-intensive problems, are crucial. Excellent spoken and written English communication skills are also required.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Work with structured and unstructured datasets to support SWE Bench\\-style evaluation tasks.
* Design, build, and validate data pipelines used in benchmarking and evaluation workflows.
* Perform data processing, analysis, feature preparation, and validation for data science use cases.
* Write, run, and modify Python code to process data and support experiments locally.
* Evaluate data quality, transformations, and outputs for correctness and reproducibility.
* Create clean, well\\-documented, and reusable data workflows suitable for benchmarking purposes.
* Participate in code reviews to ensure high standards of code quality and maintainability.
* Collaborate with researchers and engineers to design challenging, real\\-world data engineering and data science tasks for AI systems.


**Benefits**
 As a freelancer with Turing, you will enjoy the flexibility of working in a fully remote environment, allowing you to manage your work\\-life balance effectively. You will have the opportunity to engage in cutting\\-edge AI projects with leading language model companies, expanding your expertise and professional network. Turing provides a platform to work on impactful projects that push the boundaries of AI technology, offering valuable experience in a rapidly evolving industry.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and applicants. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status. We believe diversity enhances innovation and creativity, and we welcome applicants from all backgrounds to join our team.
